title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises:
Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
